violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. > Observed employee handle phone at front service counter. Employee proceeded to return to cooking duties without handwash, donning gloves. Instructed employee to dispose of donned gloves and go wash hands first.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Food contact surface of utensil/equipment was not properly cleaned and sanitized. > Observed in use thermometer not being sanitized between uses of different foods (Cooked chicken + cold hold checking)--In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. > Observed thermometer being stored on a prep counter covered in food debris.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. > Found opened can of peaches in original container not date marked. Corrected on site.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. > Shelving throughout the front service counter and above prep table next to chicken broilers is wood material that needs sealed/painted over.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. > Conveyor pizza oven has not been cleaned in months when asked. Food debris under the belt and drip stains are present all over.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. > Caulking on the handwash sink is in need of repairs. Very worn. > Totes used for storing used dishes are damaged and heavily soiled/very dirty.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. > Microwave has not been cleaned as necessary. Splatter inside. > All refrigeration and cold hold units have food debris everywhere and have not been cleaned in quite some time.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. > Surfaces throughout the kitchen are needing deep cleaned. All stainless steel surfaces, shelving above prep table has frosting caked on and into it, grease residue is present on conveyor oven, Chicken broilers have not had a clean as needed.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. > Ventilation filters over the chicken broilers have not been cleaned since January and are due for cleaning.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room used by women did not contain at least one covered waste receptacle. > Provide covered receptacles in the women's bathrooms.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. > Floor debris everywhere throughout kitchen has not been cleaned as necessary. Lots of build up over time. > Heavy dust debris in the walk in cooler fans.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. > Worn floor and cement underneath the sinks. > Floor in walk in needs cleaned and is heavily worn.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --Employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. > Found multiple jackets hanging and/or stuffed on shelve where food is present and not properly hung on designated area.
Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. -CFSM expired 11/05/25.

General food protection. — --Food item was not protected from potential contamination. -Case of French Toast sticks has chunk of ice from freezer "waterfall" in product. -Case of food on floor in walk in freezer. *Walk in freezer has "waterfall" of ice below condenser with ice build up on lower shelf cases of food and floor.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Open bag of pizza topping in bottom of 3 door prep table. -Open bags of sauce and mac n cheese in stainless refrigerator are not date marked. -Buffet line items (i.e. hard boiled eggs) in walk in cooler are not date marked.
Contaminated food disposition. — --Apple topping had discard date of 11/05/25.*COS-disposed of immediately.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Cardboard shelf liner -Pizza box being used as shelf liner at cooked side of pizza oven.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Caulking back of hand sink is cracked and worn. -Totes used for dirty pans are damaged with holes and are heavily soiled. -Cabinet below salad bar is an open hole (shelf was cut out).

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Splatter at all interior surfaces of microwave. -Food debris in bottom of 3 door prep table. -Stainless refrigerator has heavy food splatter/debris throughout unit.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Surfaces throughout in need of deep clean: stainless prep table lower shelf, heavy frosting/food debris at frosting shelf, grease residue at utility cart and sides/tops of fryers, hanging debris on shelf in chicken refrigerator, residue at handles and surfaces of prep table and stainless fridge, crumb debris and residue at dry topping prep table, debris at corner of dishwasher, debris at walk in cooler shelving units, etc.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical ware washing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Dishwasher found with 0ppm chlorine solution. *Sanitizer chemical bucket was empty. COS-staff restocked and primed machine.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -2 cases of napkins and 1 case of plastic silverware on floor behind pizza buffet line. -Sleeve of catering boxes stored on floor in old mop room.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc …) were not maintained in good repair. -Worn/exposed cement below sinks. -Worn/unsealed cement in walk in cooler. -Fan blades removed (damaged) from 2nd fan assembly of walk in freezer.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floor debris throughout, heavy grease presence around fryers, debris below equipment and residue build up on floors of walk in cooler. -Heavy Dust debris at walk in cooler fans.
Proper storage, no-reuse (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
